message:
fix(extras,widgets): remove redundant #[must_use] and fix unused results

Remove double_must_use from Shadow::new, GlowConfig::new, OutlineConfig::new,
get_shadows() in text_effects.rs. Remove #[must_use] from FocusManager::focus()
and blur() (mutating methods where side effect is primary). Add let _ = for
take_focus_event() in tests and focus_integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
